title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at ECIL

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at ECIL
jsonLd.description:
ECIL, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
